Назначение: Compare aggregated TEC statistics across two or more predefined regions for the same time interval.
Основные аргументы: dataset_ref, region_ids, start, end, freq, metrics
Используется в сценариях: legacy/aggregate compare; not expected primitive workflow

Назначение: Compare two or more previously computed TEC statistics handles and return structured pairwise metric deltas.
Возвращаемые artifacts: comparison_id, stats_ids, reference_stats_id, regions, items, pairwise_deltas

Назначение: Compute a high-TEC threshold for a stored time series. Usually use method='quantile' and q=0.9 unless the user explicitly asks for another threshold.
Возвращаемые artifacts: threshold_id, series_id, method, q, value, n_points_used

Назначение: Compute selected deterministic statistics for a previously loaded TEC time series and return a stats_id handle.
Возвращаемые artifacts: stats_id, series_id, region_id, n_points, finite_points, metrics

Назначение: Compute rolling-window thresholds for stable interval detection using quantiles of rolling TEC variability.
Возвращаемые artifacts: threshold_id, series_id, method, window_minutes, q_delta, q_std, max_delta_threshold, rolling_std_threshold, estimated_step_minutes, window_points, n_points, max_abs_delta, max_std, n_windows_used

Назначение: Detect intervals where TEC is greater than or equal to a previously computed high-TEC threshold.
Detect stable TEC intervals using previously computed stability thresholds.
Detect stable TEC intervals using explicit variability limits without a separate threshold computation step.
Основные аргументы: series_id, window_minutes, max_delta, max_abs_delta, max_std, min_duration_minutes, merge_gap_minutes
Используется в сценариях: direct stable helper; not expected five-task sequence

Назначение: Load a TEC time series for one predefined geographic region and a half-open time interval [start, end).
Return descriptive statistics for a previously loaded TEC time series.
Возвращаемые artifacts: series_id, n_points, finite_points, start, end, min_value, max_value, mean_value, median_value, std_value, q10, q25, q75, q90
Используется в сценариях: optional profiling; sometimes attempted by LLM roles
